hero.title: Healthy Smiles Start Here
hero.subtitle: Providing compassionate, high-quality dental care for patients of all ages. From routine cleanings to advanced restorative treatments, we're here to help you smile with confidence.

whyChooseUs.title: Exceptional Dental Care You Can Trust
whyChooseUs.subtitle: We combine advanced technology with compassionate care to give every patient a comfortable, stress-free experience.

features.title: Experienced Team
features.description: Our skilled dentists and staff are dedicated to providing exceptional care.

features.title: Modern Technology
features.description: Digital imaging and advanced equipment help ensure accurate, comfortable treatment.

features.title: Convenient Scheduling
features.description: Flexible appointments and emergency dental care when you need it most.

features.title: Personalized Care
features.description: Every treatment plan is tailored to your unique smile and oral health goals.

about.title: Creating Healthy Smiles For The Whole Family
about.description: At Nash Dental, we believe everyone deserves compassionate, high-quality dental care. Our team is committed to making every visit comfortable while providing personalized treatment using modern techniques and technology.

practiceAreas.title: Complete Dental Care
practiceAreas.subtitle: Everything you need to maintain a healthy, confident smile.

items.title: Dental Implants
items.description: Permanent tooth replacement designed to look, feel, and function naturally.

items.title: Professional Whitening
items.description: Brighten your smile safely with professional in-office whitening treatments.

items.title: Insurance Assistance
items.description: We'll help maximize your dental benefits and simplify the insurance process.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.quote: The entire team is friendly, welcoming, and professional. They made me feel comfortable from the moment I walked in.

reviews.name: Michael R.
reviews.quote: I couldn't be happier with my new smile. The staff explained every step of the process and the results exceeded my expectations.

reviews.name: Jennifer T.
reviews.quote: The whitening treatment was quick, painless, and my smile has never looked better. Highly recommend Nash Dental!

contact.title: Ready To Schedule Your Visit?
contact.subtitle: Whether you need a routine cleaning or advanced dental treatment, our team is here to help. Contact us today to schedule your appointment.

footer.tagline: Helping our community smile with confidence.
